summary: This release adds a real example business skill, stronger metadata linting, and a minimal eval harness example for the repository.

changes.title: Release note writer skill
changes.description: Added a reusable skill that drafts release notes from a structured JSON change feed.

changes.title: Progressive metadata lint
changes.description: The repository lint now checks that openai.yaml stays aligned with SKILL metadata.

changes.title: Developer onboarding docs
changes.description: Added environment setup and common command references for contributors.

known_issues: A final human review is still recommended before publishing public release notes.
